description: An FP&A analyst needs to update the quarterly revenue forecast based on new sales data.

nodes.task_description: Import the latest sales data into the financial planning model.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully imports the new data, which shows higher-than-expected sales.

nodes.task_description: Rerun the revenue forecast calculation in the planning tool.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the forecast, which now projects a 5% increase in quarterly revenue.

nodes.task_description: Publish the updated forecast and notify stakeholders.

expected_outcome.value: Agent saves the new forecast version and sends a notification to the management team.
